text: The system shall migrate ABC Paint to a new paint numbering scheme.
The system shall provide a conversion mechanism from old paints and collections to new paints and collections.
The application shall be integrated into the current ABC Paint website.
The system shall be composed of modularized features where each module fits on a single webpage.
The application shall provide a theme and styling mechanism for web design integration.
The system shall provide documentation for website users, paint distributors, and IT setup.
The system shall include an old to new product-line translator.
The system shall include a graphical color chooser.
The system shall include a color search engine for all collections or specific collections.
The system shall include a session-persistent user color palette.
The system shall include an administrative interface.
The system shall provide a pointing device driven color selection utility.
The system shall find a specified number of colors near a given color.
The system shall allow administrative users to update, add, and delete colors.
The system shall allow level 3 administrative users to create other administrative users at any level.
The system shall allow level 2 administrative users to create administrative users up to level 2.
The system shall allow level 1 administrative users to create administrative users at level 1 only.
The server shall require at least a 1GHz processor for each group of 50 users.
The server shall require at least 512 MB of system memory for each group of 50 users.
The client shall be compatible with Internet Explorer 4.01, Netscape 6.0, or Mozilla 1.0 or later.
The application shall retain full usability with a keyboard input device only where possible.
The system shall provide a utility to report errors automatically.
The system shall attempt full recovery after an error occurs.
The system shall provide on-line help and an online tutorial within the client application.
The databases shall respond to queries in sub-second time.
The interface shall use accelerator keys to allow limited keyboard-only use.
The system shall provide a task-pane in all workflow scenarios for help and navigation.
The client computer shall have a display device capable of displaying 16.7 million colors or greater.
The product shall communicate via Hyper Text Transfer Protocol (HTTP) version 1.0 or 1.1.
The system shall process color searches in sub-second time on the server.
The system shall process changes to paint and collection information in real-time.
The system shall remove user color palette data from the server after 30 days.
The system shall protect access to administrative features and permissions using a username and pass phrase.
